buzz-crypto-bd.name: Buzz Crypto BD Agent
buzz-crypto-bd.description: Production-grade crypto BD intelligence — token scoring (11 rules, $0 LLM cost), wallet guard (3-state BLOCK/WARN/ALLOW), BD screening (7-phase pipeline), swarm simulation (1000-10K agents), and BuzzShield security scanner. Built by a chef, powered by 32 intel sources across 19 chains.
buzz-crypto-bd.author: SolCex Exchange (@BuzzBySolCex)
